prompt: Restore this exact seated statue of Pharaoh Khafre. Keep the same statue, same seated pose, same throne, same camera angle, same black diorite stone, realistic museum-quality artifact photo, clean isolated background, highly detailed, sharp.
negative_prompt: different artifact, bust, standing statue, wrong pose, wrong throne, wrong angle, fantasy, cartoon, blur, distortion, extra limbs, museum room, table, people, text, watermark, oversaturated
notes: Full input is the default primary version. Cropped input is kept as a secondary variant for future comparison.
